text: I am compelled by the interplay between transparency and separation here—the glass wall both invites and isolates, reflecting my own image as I gaze inside. There is a sense of anticipation, as though I am about to enter a threshold between the mundane world of the corridor and the curated intellect of the R+D exhibition. Under the cool, artificial lights, I feel slightly detached but deeply curious, wondering about the boundaries we create, both physical and philosophical, when dividing spaces of thought from spaces of passage.
